issue_title: Handle empty input and None items in parse_items
issue_text: parse_items([]) currently crashes, and parse_items([' A ', None, 'B ']) also raises because None values are not filtered. The function should return [] for empty input and ignore None items during normalization.
success_criteria: All parser tests pass, including empty input and None-item handling.

metadata.notes: 用于区分 baseline 与 improved policy 的任务。
